✓ SIGN UP CHECKLIST
• Sign Up Contract (All Pmt info is correct & signed (preferably
econtract)
o Sync to CRM if automatic
• Add to Master Client Roster Under “Intro Offer”
• Add to Clipboard System For Weekly Communication
o Texts or Voxer
• Add to Skipio Under “Trial” Group
• Sign Up For EFT Contract
• Enter Info Into Automated Wow Portal (tablet)
• Move in Master Client Roster Under “Current Mo”
• Add To A Team (A thru E)
• Write Handwritten Welcome Card (or add to stack where hand-
written cards go out)
• Add to Skipio For Text Retention
• Add to Email List If Not Automatic
